demographics.living_situation: lives at a private residence; largely housebound and bedbound today because of severe anxiety about leaving home

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I'm so exhausted I can barely lift my arms, my feet are tingling constantly, and I haven't had my B12 shot in six weeks because I couldn't leave the house.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I'm overdue for my regular vitamin B12 injection — I've missed it for about six weeks because my anxiety stops me leaving the house, and now I feel terrible and just want to get my injection sorted.

symptom_narrative.onset: creeping up over the past few weeks since I missed my scheduled B12 injection about six weeks ago
symptom_narrative.duration: several weeks, and worse over the last few days
symptom_narrative.character: completely drained and heavy — I can barely lift my arms — with constant pins-and-needles and numbness in both feet
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst tiredness I've had in a long time; I've been in bed most of the day
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the tiredness is all over; the tingling and numbness is in both feet
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: my B12 injection normally sorts it out, but I've missed the last few
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: nothing specific — it's just been building up since I ran past my injection date
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling lightheaded and dizzy when I move around, and I look really pale
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: mostly bedbound today; I can't face leaving the house because of my anxiety

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: pernicious anaemia / vitamin B12 deficiency — the doctors told me my body can't absorb B12 from food so I have to have the injections
past_medical_history.how_managed: regular vitamin B12 (hydroxocobalamin) injections given by a nurse

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: severe agoraphobia and anxiety that makes it very hard for me to leave the house

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: housebound because of severe anxiety about leaving the house; keeps missing appointments and essential treatment as a result

communication_style.typical_message_style: short, slow, effortful messages; tired and low

access_barriers.transport: cannot readily attend a clinic because leaving home triggers severe anxiety
access_barriers.other: severe agoraphobia is the main barrier to receiving scheduled injections

objective_data_offered.value: I look really pale and washed out, and talking is an effort
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-description, not a clinician assessment

objective_data_offered.value: constant pins-and-needles and reduced feeling in both feet
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-report of sensation, not a clinician neurological examination
